purpose: Machine-readable registry for generic external dataset import capabilities that Foundry may route without owning shared CLI, SDK, converter, or database business logic.

capabilities.input_contract: Task kind, dataset type, and required gate names.
capabilities.output_contract: capability-route-plan.json when --out-dir is supplied, otherwise JSON on stdout.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be routed before autonomous adapter execution.

capabilities.input_contract: External LCA package, converted TIDAS rows, or source-document authoring task plus one Foundry workspace task directory.
capabilities.output_contract: Ordered Foundry/CLI artifact chain from context, conversion or authoring, schema, QA, curation, AI semantic evidence (classification/location decision apply or patch collect/apply), post-authoring finalize report, mutation manifest, commit handoff, post-write remote verification, post-write closeout, task-level import completion report, and gated task completion.
capabilities.remote_write_mode: orchestrates CLI-only task-policy-gated batch writes; no direct database access
capabilities.verification_gate: The skill must not write database rows directly; commit remains blocked until the post-authoring finalize report and mutation manifest are ready_for_remote_write, the handoff plan is ready_for_explicit_commit, AI semantic evidence proves full schema/YAML/ruleset/context use, and task write policy permits the exact scope. A committed write scope is not closed until post-write verification and dataset-post-write-closeout pass for the exact final rows. A task is not complete until dataset-import-completion-report aggregates all required closeouts and task-complete moves the matching active task to done. Blocked scopes remain in the blocker ledger while independent ready scopes may continue.

capabilities.input_contract: Target TIDAS dataset type plus requested schema, methodology YAML, ruleset, and AI context artifacts.
capabilities.output_contract: contract-report.json, contract-manifest.json, schema.json, methodology.yaml, runtime-ruleset.json, ai-context.json, and ai-context.md when available.
capabilities.verification_gate: contract manifest must include artifact hashes before AI authoring or conversion repair consumes the context.

capabilities.input_contract: Supported external LCA source package, explicit output directory, source format detection mode, and target format.
capabilities.output_contract: import-lca-report.json, conversion-report.json, process-bundles/index.json with one dependency subdirectory per converted process by default, mapping.csv when generated, and converted TIDAS/ILCD package outputs.
capabilities.verification_gate: converter exit code must be zero and generated TIDAS rows must pass downstream schema/QA/curation gates.

capabilities.input_contract: PDF, Excel, image, markdown, or other source document plus target TIDAS types and an output directory.
capabilities.output_contract: authoring-report.json, source-extract.json, and context/<type>/ contract context packs for each target type.
capabilities.verification_gate: source extract and target contract manifests must exist before candidate row generation or repair begins.

capabilities.input_contract: Field-level evidence question, target field context, preferred domains, required terms, and search budget.
capabilities.output_contract: evidence-search-plan.json.
capabilities.verification_gate: plan must identify field scope, required evidence, source policy, and bounded query budget before public-source search runs.

capabilities.input_contract: Evidence-search request plus normalized search results or a provider URL.
capabilities.output_contract: evidence-search-report.json, evidence-search-results.jsonl, and evidence-search-declaration.json when evidence is absent or partial.
capabilities.verification_gate: absence or partial evidence must block invented field values and create explicit review assumptions.

capabilities.input_contract: Local source document path, supported document file type, and UNSTRUCTURED_* environment variables for the MinerU fulltext extraction API.
capabilities.output_contract: Runtime skill instructions and extracted fulltext captured as source evidence candidates, followed by Foundry evidence records under evidence/fulltext.txt and evidence/source-extract.json.
capabilities.verification_gate: Before parsing, runtime-skill-resolution.json must record the npx skills command, source repo, refs/heads/main commit from git ls-remote, skill name, evidence channel=document-fulltext, and timestamp. Extracted text is source evidence only; field values require downstream evidence capture, limitations, curation, and validation gates.

capabilities.input_contract: SCI literature evidence question, query terms, optional filters/date filters, top-k budget, and authenticated Tiangong AI CLI environment when the remote KB requires it.
capabilities.output_contract: Runtime skill instructions and SCI search outputs captured as evidence candidates, followed by Foundry evidence records under evidence/sources.jsonl and evidence/field-evidence.jsonl.
capabilities.verification_gate: Before retrieval, runtime-skill-resolution.json must record the npx skills command, source repo, refs/heads/main commit from git ls-remote, skill name, evidence channel=sci, and timestamp. Search results are candidates only; field values require downstream evidence capture, limitations, curation, and validation gates.

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSON or JSONL.
capabilities.output_contract: DatasetValidateReport plus split valid/invalid rows under outputs/.
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.invalid must be zero before remote write.

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSON or JSONL.
capabilities.output_contract: DatasetValidateReport plus split valid/invalid rows under outputs/.
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.invalid must be zero before remote write.

capabilities.input_contract: Lifecyclemodel rows as JSON or JSONL.
capabilities.output_contract: DatasetValidateReport plus split valid/invalid rows under outputs/.
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.invalid must be zero before remote write.

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows as JSONL or process QA materialization input.
capabilities.output_contract: Deterministic process QA report plus markdown and JSON metric artifacts.
capabilities.verification_gate: command must complete; Foundry owns profile policy, AI authoring packages, waivers, and final blocker decisions.

capabilities.input_contract: Flow rows as JSONL or flow QA materialization input.
capabilities.output_contract: Flow QA report plus finding artifacts.
capabilities.verification_gate: command must complete before target-quality readiness.

capabilities.input_contract: Lifecyclemodel build run directory.
capabilities.output_contract: Lifecyclemodel QA report plus model summaries, findings, markdown, and timing artifacts.
capabilities.verification_gate: command must complete before target-quality readiness.

capabilities.input_contract: Process rows, optional local flow rows, optional support rows, optional external flow references, and output directory.
capabilities.output_contract: CLI-owned curation queue artifacts: curation-queue-manifest.json, curation-queue-tasks.jsonl, curation-queue-locks.json, curation-queue-blockers.jsonl, and per-entity input/closure/run-plan files.
capabilities.verification_gate: curation-queue-blockers.jsonl must be empty for the claimed dependency closure before AI authoring or remote write planning treats that scope as complete; blockers for unrelated closures can remain recorded while independent scopes proceed.

capabilities.input_contract: Curation queue directory produced by build, plus optional entity type or task id scope.
capabilities.output_contract: Next queue report with status ready, complete, or blocked; when ready, includes exactly one runnable entity_curation_task and its input/checkpoint artifacts.
capabilities.verification_gate: Workers must execute only the returned task and update that task checkpoint before calling next again. Parallel workers are allowed only across independent locks and configured max_parallelism. If next is blocked and no runnable task exists for a scope, that scope cannot proceed autonomously.

capabilities.input_contract: Curation queue directory produced by build, plus optional entity type or task id scope.
capabilities.output_contract: Queue verification report with passed only when all scoped task checkpoints are complete and build blockers are absent.
capabilities.verification_gate: Report status must be passed for the intended support, flow, process, or task scope before remote write planning treats the queue as complete.

capabilities.input_contract: Dataset rows, dataset validate report, deterministic QA report, import profile id, optional SDK contract context files, and optional classification/location authoring queues from bundle sampling or equivalent schema audits.
capabilities.output_contract: dataset-curation-gate-report.json plus per-entity AI authoring packages carrying row payload, schema issues, QA findings, profile context, optional full schema/YAML/ruleset context, classification action items, and tidas_locations_category.json location-code action items.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be ready or ready_with_profile_waivers before remote write; blocked statuses require skill/Codex patch output, deterministic cleanup, and deterministic revalidation.

capabilities.input_contract: One Foundry AI authoring package generated by dataset-curation-gate, or one dataset-curation-gate-report.json for batch task generation, plus an explicit output directory.
capabilities.output_contract: Single package mode writes ai-authoring-task.json, ai-authoring-task.md, and patch-template.json. Batch mode writes authoring-task-manifest.json, authoring-tasks.jsonl with per-task context/package hash summaries, per-entity task directories, a batch patch target, and the strict dataset-patch-apply command for deterministic application.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be ready_for_ai_authoring, ready_for_ai_authoring_batch, or ready_no_action_items; generated patch-template.json is intentionally incomplete and must not pass patch apply until AI supplies evidence or basis.

capabilities.input_contract: authoring-task-manifest.json after Codex/skill has written per-task AI patch files.
capabilities.output_contract: authoring-patch-collect-report.json and, when all task outputs are present and structurally valid, ai-patches.batch.json for deterministic dataset-patch-apply.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be ready_for_patch_apply before dataset-patch-apply; blocked reports identify missing patch files, incomplete templates, unresolved AI placeholders, invalid patch structure, authoring package mismatch, missing evidence, basis-only full-context evidence, invalid resolution.mode, missing resolution.used_context_kinds for every required full-context kind, invalid or weak common:other deferral trace evidence, invalid or weak sourceExchangeCompleteness trace evidence, or unclosed action items.
source_manifest_requirements: authoring task manifest with per-task context summaries

capabilities.input_contract: Dataset rows plus AI-authored structured patch sets that target rows by row_index or dataset_id and contain evidence or basis for every non-test operation. Foundry import workflows should pass --authoring-package-dir and --require-action-item-closure so every patch set is tied to the matching AI authoring package and closes the package action_items it resolves.
capabilities.output_contract: CLI-owned dataset-patch-apply-report.json, patched rows JSONL, and patch-evidence.jsonl with Foundry wrapper metadata, authoring package hash, and closed action item evidence.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be completed before cleanup, revalidation, dry-run, or mutation manifest; blocked patch apply returns to AI authoring with blocker evidence for test failures, missing evidence, missing package lineage, or unclosed action items.

capabilities.input_contract: Dataset rows after curation context has been captured.
capabilities.output_contract: cleaned dataset JSONL plus dataset-curation-cleanup-report.json.
capabilities.verification_gate: cleaned rows must be revalidated after cleanup and before remote write.

capabilities.input_contract: Mixed writable support rows (contact/source only unless a profile explicitly allows another public-canonical write path) or post-AI authored/patched process/flow/lifecyclemodel rows plus optional classification/location decision apply or patch collect/apply reports, target user id, profile id, queue directory, and SDK contract context files. Unitgroup/flowproperty rows are normally reference-only canonical reuse.
capabilities.output_contract: dataset-post-authoring-finalize-report.json, cleaned support/process/flow/lifecyclemodel rows, SDK validation report, location audit report, optional deterministic QA and post-authoring curation gate reports for AI-authored dataset types, type-specific dry-run report, optional remote verification report, dataset-mutation-manifest.json, and embedded dataset-commit-handoff-plan.json path/status.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be ready_for_remote_write before a task-policy-gated CLI commit; the mutation manifest must prove reference closure for the exact write scope, and references outside that scope require passed remote verification after support rows exist remotely. Blocked status carries exact-stage artifact paths for AI repair, cleanup, validation, QA, dry-run, remote verification, reference closure, missing canonical support, or mutation manifest scope fixes.
source_manifest_requirements: AI classification/location decision apply evidence or patch collect/apply evidence when provided

capabilities.input_contract: A dataset-post-authoring-finalize-report.json whose exact-scope final rows and mutation manifest are ready_for_remote_write, plus explicit target user id and expected state_code evidence for the commit scope.
capabilities.output_contract: dataset-commit-handoff-plan.json with the CLI commit command and required post-write dataset verify-remote command using --compare-root-payload only when ready_for_explicit_commit; blocked reports keep commands null and expose blockers when state, owner, rows, finalize, or manifest readiness is incomplete.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be ready_for_explicit_commit before a policy-gated batch runner, user, or release operator runs the generated commit command; post_write_verify command must be run after commit and must pass before the import is treated as complete.
source_manifest_requirements: common:other unresolved trace queue when present
source exchange completeness trace queue when present

capabilities.input_contract: A ready dataset-commit-handoff-plan.json with readable finalize and mutation-manifest reports, the CLI commit report produced by the generated commit command, and the post-write remote-verification-report.json produced from the handoff post_write_verify command.
capabilities.output_contract: dataset-post-write-closeout-report.json with completed only when the handoff was ready, the commit report is commit mode with no row failures, post-write verification used the exact same final rows, root readback checks prove equal local/remote payload hashes, target owner and expected state_code match, profile-required full schema/YAML/context AI proof is still present, and trace queue artifacts remain attached.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be completed before a committed import is treated as closed; blocked reports return to commit/readback investigation, exact-scope repair, profile-required full-context AI proof repair, or trace artifact repair.
source_manifest_requirements: remote-verification checks JSONL with local/remote payload hashes
mutation manifest full-context proof and AI semantic evidence counts when required by profile
common:other unresolved trace queue when present
source exchange completeness trace queue when present

capabilities.input_contract: One task directory or explicit list of dataset-post-write-closeout-report.json files, plus optional required dataset types and expected closeout count for the import task.
capabilities.output_contract: dataset-import-completion-report.json with completed only when every discovered or provided closeout is completed, each closeout still has readable finalize and mutation reports for the same final rows, no two closeouts point to the same dataset type and final rows file, post-write readback evidence remains attached, profile-required full schema/YAML/context AI proof and evidence counts remain attached, required dataset types are present, and trace queue counts remain preserved.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be completed before moving a Foundry import task to done; blocked reports return to missing closeouts, duplicate closeout scope repair, non-completed closeouts, exact-scope evidence repair, full-context proof repair, or trace artifact repair.
source_manifest_requirements: task directory or closeout report list
required dataset type list when applicable

capabilities.input_contract: One active filesystem task id or tasks/active/*.md file plus a dataset-import-completion-report.json whose status is completed, whose task_id matches the active task id, and whose closeouts prove profile-required full schema/YAML/context AI completion.
capabilities.output_contract: The task frontmatter is updated with state=Done, completion_report, and completed_at, then the file moves from tasks/active to tasks/done. Blocked reports do not move files.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be completed before the filesystem task is terminal; blocked reports return to missing active task, missing completion report, non-completed completion report, task id mismatch, missing closeout scope, missing profile-required full-context AI proof, or done-file collision.

capabilities.input_contract: Ready write-candidate rows, schema validation report, post-authoring Foundry curation gate report, CLI dry-run report, explicit target user id, optional AI patch apply report/evidence, cleanup report, remote verification report, and reference-reuse rows. Evidence reports must point to the exact rows-file scope: schema and remote verification input_path match rows-file; curation gate rows_file and deterministic QA report rows_file/input_path match rows-file; cleanup cleaned_rows_file matches rows-file; AI patch apply output matches cleanup input when patching was used.
capabilities.output_contract: dataset-mutation-manifest.json plus JSONL item list separating write_or_update candidates, reusable existing references, covered rows, and blocked rows with evidence-linked reasons; unresolved-traces.jsonl and source-exchange-completeness-traces.jsonl expose common:other Foundry trace entries for later database-side repair.
capabilities.verification_gate: status must be ready_for_remote_write before commit; blocked rows must return to Foundry AI authoring, deterministic QA/curation, deterministic cleanup, owner guard, exact-scope evidence repair, full-context package lineage repair, or reference closure repair.
source_manifest_requirements: post-authoring curation gate report with matching rows_file and ready status
deterministic QA report referenced by curation gate with matching rows_file/input_path
cleanup report with matching cleaned rows
remote verification report with matching input_path when provided
AI classification decision apply report with output chained into cleanup and bound to a classification decision task/context_bundle_sha256 when classification queues were used
AI location decision apply report with output chained into cleanup and bound to a location decision task/context_bundle_sha256 when location queues were used
AI patch collect/apply report/evidence with output chained into cleanup when AI-authored field patches were used
AI patch authoring_package_sha256 matching a readable package with non-empty schema/YAML/ruleset text when patches were used
unresolved common:other trace queue when present

capabilities.input_contract: Local process, flow, or lifecyclemodel rows as JSON/JSONL plus explicit output file and artifact directory.
capabilities.output_contract: patched rows, rewrite plan, remote refresh report, pre/post remote verification artifacts, and summary.
capabilities.verification_gate: remote refresh report must leave no unresolved reachable reference version updates before publish preparation.

capabilities.input_contract: Rows as JSON or JSONL with root dataset id/version and TIDAS references. Post-commit readback must pass --compare-root-payload plus explicit --target-user-id and --state-code for the committed scope.
capabilities.output_contract: remote-verification-report.json, remote-verification.jsonl, and blockers.jsonl, including root readback payload hashes when --compare-root-payload is used.
capabilities.verification_gate: counts.blockers must be zero before publish-prep or remote write approval; after commit, root_payload_mismatches must be zero and owner/state readback checks must pass.

capabilities.input_contract: Publish request/bundle with process, flow, lifecyclemodel, and support payload references.
capabilities.output_contract: publish-report.json plus verification-report.json.
capabilities.verification_gate: verification.blocker_count must be zero for the exact scope, no deferred/failed step remains, and commit requires task write policy plus account guard.
